specific_question: What was the average battery charging efficiency rate achieved during Elexion Automotive's quality testing of 2025 model vehicles in October 2024?
answer: During October 2024 quality testing, Elexion Automotive's 2025 model achieved an average battery charging efficiency rate of 94.7% from 10% to 80% state of charge.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive's quality assurance testing protocols prioritize Apple CarPlay and Android Auto connectivity performance by Q4 2025 for 2026 EV models to differentiate from competitors and attract 50% of Apple users and 42% of Samsung users who depend on smartphone connections every drive?
